name: 折刀（★） | 深红之网
descriptionEn: This marble-enamel-handled flip knife conceals a small but viciously tapered blade. It has been painted using a spider web-patterned hydrographic over a red base coat and finished with a semi-gloss topcoat. Be careful where you walk, you never know where the web is spread
descriptionZh: 这把折叠刀的大理石纹珐琅刀柄中藏着小巧而致命的锥形刀刃。 这把武器以红色为外表，使用蜘蛛网图案的花纹进行了涂装，完毕后再配上了半光的表层。 留意你的脚步，你永远都不会知道蛛网撒在何处
